prestazioni: AM29 4.0L Twin-Turbo V8 (AE31) engine: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (84mm compressor, 106mm turbine) paired with a custom 4-inch titanium downpipe system by Armytrix, featuring 304 stainless steel mandrel bends and integrated 200-cell catalytic converters for Euro 6d compliance. Supporting mods include a bespoke ECU remap by Dimsport Genius with Bowmore Edition-specific fueling maps (1,200cc ID1700x injectors, upgraded CP3 high-pressure fuel pump) and a custom intercooler setup by Wagner Tuning (800hp-rated core, 3.5-inch silicone couplers).

Drivetrain reinforcement: Quaife ATB differential (part #QDF12H) with 3.73:1 final drive ratio, paired with a Tilton 7.25-inch triple-plate carbon clutch (rated for 1,000Nm) and a PWR 400-series aluminum radiator with integrated transmission cooler for the ZF 8HP95 transmission. Custom driveshafts by GKN Driveline with 4340 chromoly steel CV joints for 1,200Nm torque capacity.

Suspension and braking: Öhlins TTX46 coilovers with 24-way adjustable damping (DBX-specific valving), paired with Eibach ERS 14mm front / 12mm rear anti-roll bars. Brembo GT-R 6-piston front (410mm discs) and 4-piston rear (380mm discs) calipers with carbon-ceramic rotors (CCM-R compound), featuring Bowmore Edition-exclusive gold anodized caliper pistons. Pagid RSL29 brake pads and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid for 300°C+ heat resistance.
estetica: Bowmore Edition-exclusive carbon fiber widebody kit by Prior Design (PD800WB), featuring 50mm front / 70mm rear fender flares with integrated LED turn signals (Osram LEDriving SL 1), and a custom front splitter with active Gurney flap (adjustable via Bowmore Edition infotainment system).

Custom paintwork by R-M (BASF) in 'Bowmore 18-Year Sherry Cask' metallic (code: 040M), with hand-applied gold leaf pinstriping (24K, 0.1mm width) by Pinstripe Kingdom, and a matte clear coat by Spies Hecker (Permasolid HS 8010). Carbon fiber mirror caps by Carbon Revolution with integrated Bowmore Edition logo (laser-etched, backlit).

Interior overhaul: Full Alcantara retrim by Bridge of Weir (color: 'Bowmore Smoke'), featuring diamond-stitching on the dashboard and door cards. Custom Recaro CS-E 310 seats (carbon shell, 10-way electric adjustment) with Bowmore Edition embroidery (gold thread, 3D logo). Steering wheel by Nardi (380mm, suede-wrapped) with integrated AIM MXS 1.2 data display (lap timer, boost gauge, oil temp).
